name: ROCm Examples bit extract kernel
description: Pinned HIP kernel slice used by the open-source project porting demo.

adjustments.summary: Used the upstream bit-extract HIP kernel slice without the surrounding sample host code.
adjustments.detail: Only the kernel slice is translated; sample host main(), HIP runtime calls, and launch configuration are excluded.

adjustments.summary: Selected the AMD HIP branch via the __HIP_PLATFORM_AMD__=1 project define.
adjustments.detail: crosstl.toml sets __HIP_PLATFORM_AMD__=1 so include/define preprocessing resolves the AMD HIP code path.

outOfScope: Sample host main(), HIP runtime calls, and launch configuration
